name: property managers handling 5–15 lease agreements/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 lease agreements/month, missed lease renewals cause revenue loss. We provide automated renewal alerts instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: missed lease renewals leading to potential vacancy and revenue loss
features: manual entry of lease expiry dates

locked_fields.primary_problem: missed lease renewals leading to potential vacancy and revenue loss
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 lease agreements/month, missed lease renewals cause revenue loss. We provide automated renewal alerts instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of lease dates using spreadsheets
must_have_features: manual entry of lease expiry dates

one_liner: For property managers processing 5–15 lease agreements/month, missed lease renewals cause revenue loss. We provide automated renewal alerts instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
